
## ③ `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/feature_request.md`

- [ ] Calm before excitement
- [ ] Creation over consumption
- [ ] Respect player time
- [ ] Never punish curiosity
- [ ] Screenshot first
- [ ] Build the Future Together
